name: Gustav Holst
abstract: Gustav Holst (born Gustavus Theodore von Holst; 21 September 1874 – 25 May 1934) was an English composer, arranger and teacher. Best known for his orchestral suite The Planets, he composed many other works across a range of genres, although none achieved comparable success.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I think that’s this Gustav Holst piece called The Planets... I liked it... I want to get into classical music
